mechanism_fixtures.purpose: Reduce the light category-band and low-contrast label failure from the reported benchmark table.
assertions: The authored category gradient contains a light stop before activation.
The extension installs its background-image variable and maps every solid stop to a dark surface.
Category text remains at or above 4.5:1 against the brightest mapped stop.
Disable restores the authored gradient exactly.

mechanism_fixtures.purpose: Reduce the white vertical side-band failure to generated before/after surfaces around a table.
assertions: Both generated rails are authored light before activation.
Both rails receive extension-owned pseudo-surface markers and render dark after activation.
Disable removes the markers and restores both authored rails.

hard_failures.condition: Any supported normal text renders below 4.5:1 against its effective backdrop.
hard_failures.measurement: WCAG relative-luminance contrast after alpha compositing.

hard_failures.condition: Any required non-text or focus paint renders below 3:1 against its effective backdrop.
hard_failures.measurement: WCAG relative-luminance contrast after alpha compositing.

hard_failures.condition: A mapped surface falls below 1.12:1 separation from its configured canvas or reverses a frozen authored surface order.
hard_failures.measurement: Pairwise contrast and OKLab lightness ordering.

hard_failures.condition: Automatic mode mutates a coherent native-dark or forced-colors page.
hard_failures.measurement: Extension-owned root/paint markers and before/after computed-style journal.

hard_failures.condition: Disable or authored-theme restoration leaves any supported extension-owned mutation or changed resource URL.
hard_failures.measurement: Owned-attribute, CSS-variable, SVG journal, image URL, and computed-style equality checks.

severity_levels.definition: Primary content/control disappears or becomes unusable, status/chart meaning changes, or protected media/QR/CAPTCHA is destructively recolored.
severity_levels.gate: Any candidate-caused new or worsened H3 is a veto.

severity_levels.definition: The main task remains possible, but table hierarchy, required interaction state, diagram tracking, or a large bright region is bad enough that the extension must be disabled.
severity_levels.gate: Any candidate-caused new or worsened H2 in the frozen sentinel is a veto.

severity_levels.definition: Local aesthetic, hue, or chroma regression without loss of meaning, readability, or interaction.
severity_levels.gate: Report separately; it cannot remove a hard failure or severe finding.

severity_levels.definition: Equivalent to or better than the pinned baseline.

real_page_pilot.theme_expectation: Authored dark theme remains untouched when system preference is dark.
real_page_pilot.primary_task: Read navigation and repository cards without extension-owned paint markers.
Read article navigation and code surfaces.

real_page_pilot.theme_expectation: Dark theme examples remain untouched; page chrome remains coherent.
real_page_pilot.primary_task: Compare theme swatches without extension interference.

real_page_pilot.theme_expectation: Light article/table surfaces are converted without white category bands or rails.
real_page_pilot.primary_task: Read long-form copy and benchmark tables.

real_page_pilot.theme_expectation: Dense text and form controls retain hierarchy and contrast.
real_page_pilot.primary_task: Search and read an abstract page.

real_page_pilot.theme_expectation: Dense links, metadata, and visited states remain distinguishable.
Technical prose, callouts, and anchors meet contrast floors.
Theme-aware components are not double-darkened during theme changes.
real_page_pilot.primary_task: Inspect cards, controls, and theme transition.

real_page_pilot.theme_expectation: Color examples and authored dark regions preserve semantic relationships.
real_page_pilot.primary_task: Compare color tokens and component examples.

real_page_pilot.theme_expectation: Charts, code, and page surfaces route separately without semantic color loss.
real_page_pilot.primary_task: Read a chart and trace its legend.

real_page_pilot.theme_expectation: Media remains protected while surrounding authored surfaces remain coherent.
real_page_pilot.primary_task: Read navigation and a content card without media inversion.
